prompt: Use the attached reference image. Preserve her facial identity 100% — same face shape, eyes, eyebrows, nose, lips, skin tone, hair color, hairstyle, and natural expression. She wears elegant, modest travel clothing: a fitted black long-sleeve top, cream linen trousers, white sneakers, and a delicate gold necklace. Soft natural daylight enters through the airplane window, creating flattering highlights on her face and hair. Realistic airline cabin environment, subtle depth of field, a few blurred passengers in the background, authentic travel atmosphere. No posing like a model, no glamour shoot, no heavy makeup, no AI-generated look. Just a beautiful candid travel moment captured on an iPhone by a friend sitting nearby.
